headline: Are Options Traders Betting on a Big Move in Mettler-Toledo Stock?
summary: Investors need to pay close attention to MTD stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

headline: Orthofix (OFIX) Moves 5.1% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Orthofix (OFIX) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
